description: Style Note Now give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of slippers from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Product Details Light brown sandals with thick forefoot and midfoot straps The ankle strap is fastened by a velcro closure Soft and foamy footbed Outsole adhered to the upper for durability TPU outsole with geometrical shaped lugs  Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
